---
title: "RDD"
author: "Caroline Lebrun-Sabalot, Pierre Ripoll, Matéo Garbe"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute: 
    echo: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| output: false
!pip install -r requirements.txt

```

# Balanced Checks 

::: {.panel-tabset}

## RDD1

```{python}

```


## RDD2


:::
